title: Fungibility
description: Fungibility means each unit is equally acceptable regardless of its transaction history. Weak fungibility raises censorship and surveillance risk even when base-layer ownership remains valid.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Fungibility
resources.notes: Clear framing of fungibility in Bitcoin system design.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Output Linking
resources.notes: Heuristic linkage mechanisms that degrade practical fungibility.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Money-property context for evaluating fungibility tradeoffs.
